zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Walcott於1636年5月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼薩萊姆時，她的父親William Josiah Wolcott26歲，母親Alice Ingersoll23歲。她於大約1648年與Francis Bennett在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1714年1月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Walcott于1636年5月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼薩萊姆时，她的父亲William Josiah Wolcott26岁，母亲Alice Ingersoll23岁。她于大约1648年与Francis Bennett在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1714年1月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓享年77岁。

meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Walcott, Walcot, or Walcote, for example in Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, Norfolk, Oxfordshire, and Wiltshire, all named in Old English walh ‘foreigner, Briton, serf’ (genitive plural wala) + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’ (plural cotu), i.e. ‘the cottage where the (Welsh-speaking) Britons lived’. This name is also frequent in Barbados and Jamaica, when emancipated slaves adopted it from the name of one or other of the sugar plantations owned there by English families called Walcott.
History: This surname was in MA from an early date. William Walcott emigrated from England to Salem, MA, in 1637; John Wolcott (1632–1690) is recorded in Springfield, MA.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Walcott was born on 1 May 1636, in Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, William Josiah Wolcott, was 26 and her mother, Alice Ingersoll, was 23. She married Francis Bennett about 1648, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 18 January 1714, in Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Walcott est née le 1 mai 1636, à Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Josiah Wolcott, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice Ingersoll, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Bennett environ 1648, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 janvier 1714, à Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Walcott am 1. Mai 1636 in Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Josiah Wolcott 26 und ihre Mutter Alice Ingersoll 23. Sie hat um 1648 in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Francis Bennett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Januar 1714 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Walcott è nata il il 1 maggio 1636 nel Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, William Josiah Wolcott, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Alice Ingersoll, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Francis Bennett circa 1648, nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 gennaio 1714, nel Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Walcottが1636年5月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーサレムで生まれた時，父William Josiah Wolcottは26歳，母Alice Ingersollは23歳であった。約1648年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンでFrancis Bennettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1714年1月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーサンプトンで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Walcott(이)가 1636년 5월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 살렘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Josiah Wolcott(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Ingersoll(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1648년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 Francis Bennett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1714년 1월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르섬프턴에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Walcott родилась 1 мая 1636 г. в местности сеилем, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени William Josiah Wolcott было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Ingersoll, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Bennett около 1648 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 18 января 1714 г. в местности нортамптон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Walcott nació el 1 de mayo de 1636, en Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, William Josiah Wolcott, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alice Ingersoll, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Francis Bennett aproximadamente 1648, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de enero de 1714, en Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 77 años.
